message:
fix: discard mission responses after cancellation (#4503)

Purge all pending request IDs mapped to a mission when cancelling so
that late responses from earlier failed or in-flight requests are
dropped at the lookup stage. Also guard handleAgentMessage against
messages for missions in terminal states (failed/completed) as a
defense-in-depth measure.

Root cause: cancelMission transitioned the mission to 'cancelling' and
then 'failed', but never removed stale request IDs from pendingRequests.
A late response arriving under an old request ID would still resolve to
the mission and overwrite the cancelled state.

Fixes #4499

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
